mapper.sql: ENT.ENTITY_ID, ENT.CREATED_AT, ENT.UPDATED_AT, ENT.ACTIVATED_AT, ENT.STATE_ID, ENT.SCENARIO_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ENTITIES( ENTITY_ID, CREATED_AT, STATE_ID, UPDATED_AT, SCENARIO_ID ) VALUES ( #{entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stateId, jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{scenarioId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
WITH ENTITY_ROW_IDS AS ( SELECT TABLEOID, CTID FROM ENTITIES WHERE ENTITY_ID = #{searchSet.entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND UPDATED_AT = #{searchSet.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}' ORDER BY CTID LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE ENTITIES ENT
STATE_ID = #{changeset.stateId, jdbcType=SMALLINT}, UPDATED_AT = #{changeset.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ACTIVATED_AT = #{changeset.activatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
FROM ENTITY_ROW_IDS WHERE ENT.CTID = ENTITY_ROW_IDS.CTID AND ENT.TABLEOID = ENTITY_ROW_IDS.TABLEOID AND ENT.CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND ENT.CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}'
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM ENTITIES ENT LEFT OUTER JOIN ENTITY_SCENARIOS SCNR ON SCNR.SCENARIO_ID = ENT.SCENARIO_ID WHERE ENT.ENTITY_ID IN
#{entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND ENT.CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND ENT.CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}'

SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM ENTITIES ENT WHERE ENT.ENTITY_ID = #{searchSet.entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ENT.CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND ENT.CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}')
